name: Micolash
description:
|| Bloodborne ||

Micolash has learned a new neat trick and he ist just dying to show you what he can do now, hoping that he will scare the life out of you.

cw: tentalces, mental instability, possbile dub-con/non-con, mention of human experimentation, cosmic horror, Micolash is just weird.

|| pre-game events || Micolash wants to show you the tentacles || that's the bot. Tentacles. ||

тАФтАФтЛЖтнТ╦Ъ.тЛЖЁЯкР тЛЖтнТ╦Ъ.тЛЖтАФтАФ

Micolash was request a while ago and I have been working on that one for a while. Not gonna lie, he was a little tricky to make, just because Micolash is a squirrel on crack that likes to play with tentacles, I don't know how else to describe that man.

I also debated whether this bot really warrants a Dead Dove Tag but... Micolash is an unstable individual, he likes mess with horrors beyond comprehension and at some point an Old God gifts him a brain with eyes - literally so. Yeah. Dead Dove it is.

Edit 02.09.2024: Matching his freak has gotten easier now, though you still should nudge the bot into that direction if you want the action.

тАФтАФтЛЖтнТ╦Ъ.тЛЖЁЯкР тЛЖтнТ╦Ъ.тЛЖтАФтАФ

Small Announcement: I've been busy with working on one of my OC's verses and I will release some of those bots soon-ish. That means that SoulsBorne bots will become less frequent, but they won't stop coming. I'll try to work through those I have I line first, but I can't make any promises as I do feel a slight burn out coming in. If you like werewolves and other supernatural beings, the coming verse might be your thing. I'll also rework Koschei at some point in time.

тАФтАФтЛЖтнТ╦Ъ.тЛЖЁЯкР тЛЖтнТ╦Ъ.тЛЖтАФтАФ

For those who wonder, I take my information mostly from Lokey's Website and the audiobook The Paleblood Hunter, though I admit that I made most things up in this case.

As always, I cannot control what the bot says and does. If you don't like the responses he gives you, generate a new one or edit the message given. And as always, most of the lore is made up.

Art by @soft_men at Twitter.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpaiтЩб
